lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤ ਮਹਿ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਚਿ ਵਸੈ ਭਾਈ ਜੇ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਸਮੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chit meh tthaakur sach vasai bhaaee je gur giaan samoe |2|
lines.english: The True Lord and Master abides in the consciousness, O Siblings of Destiny, if the Guru's spiritual wisdom permeates it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਚਿਤੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bikh maaeaa chit mohiaa bhaaee chaturaaee pat khoe |
lines.english: The poisonous Maya has enticed the consciousness, O Siblings of Destiny; through clever tricks, one loses his honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂੜੌ ਰੂੜੌ ਆਖੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਰੂੜੌ ਲਾਲ ਚਲੂਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: roorrau roorrau aakheeai bhaaee roorrau laal chalool |
lines.english: Beautiful, beautiful, the Lord is called, O Siblings of Destiny; beautiful, like the deep crimson color of the poppy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਬੈਰਾਗੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਅਭੂਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je man har siau bairaageeai bhaaee dar ghar saach abhool |3|
lines.english: If man loves the Lord with detachment, O Siblings of Destiny, he is judged to be true and infallible in the Lord's court and home. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਚੂਕਾ ਮਨਹੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: gur miliai sukh paaeaa bhaaee chookaa manahu gumaan |4|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, one finds peace, O Siblings of Destiny, and pride is dispelled from the mind. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਤਾਲੀ ਆਕਾਸਿ ਤੂ ਭਾਈ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਤੂ ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: paataalee aakaas too bhaaee ghar ghar too gun giaan |
lines.english: You are pervading the realms of the underworld and the heavenly skies; Your wisdom and glories are in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਮਾਜੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਭੀ ਮੈਲਾ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jal mal kaaeaa maajeeai bhaaee bhee mailaa tan hoe |
lines.english: Scrubbing with water, the body can be cleaned, O Siblings of Destiny, but the body becomes dirty again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵੀ ਦੇਵਾ ਪੂਜੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਕਿਆ ਮਾਗਉ ਕਿਆ ਦੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: devee devaa poojeeai bhaaee kiaa maagau kiaa dehi |
lines.english: Why worship gods and goddesses, O Siblings of Destiny? What can we ask of them? What can they give us?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨਿ ਮਹਾ ਰਸਿ ਨਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: giaan mahaa ras naaeeai bhaaee man tan niramal hoe |5|
lines.english: Bathing in the supreme essence of spiritual wisdom, O Siblings of Destiny, the mind and body become pure. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਜਗੁ ਬੂਡੈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin alakh na lakheeai bhaaee jag booddai pat khoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the unseen Lord cannot be seen, O Siblings of Destiny; the world is drowning, having lost its honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਹਣੁ ਨੀਰਿ ਪਖਾਲੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਜਲ ਮਹਿ ਬੂਡਹਿ ਤੇਹਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: paahan neer pakhaaleeai bhaaee jal meh booddeh tehi |6|
lines.english: The stone gods are washed with water, O Siblings of Destiny, but they just sink in the water. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਈਅਰਿ ਬੋਲੈ ਮੀਠੁਲੀ ਭਾਈ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਪਿਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: beear bolai meetthulee bhaaee saach kahai pir bhaae |
lines.english: That soul-bride, who talks sweetly and speaks the Truth, O Siblings of Destiny, becomes pleasing to her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹਾਥਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਭਾਈ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur haath vaddaaeea bhaaee jai bhaavai tai dee |7|
lines.english: Greatness is in the hands of my Lord and Master, O Siblings of Destiny; as He is pleased, He gives. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਹੈ ਬੇਧੀ ਸਚਿ ਵਸੀ ਭਾਈ ਅਧਿਕ ਰਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: birahai bedhee sach vasee bhaaee adhik rahee har naae |8|
lines.english: Pierced by His Love, she abides in Truth, O Siblings of Destiny, deeply imbued with the Lord's Name. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਆਖੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਭਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਬੁਝੈ ਸੁਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko aakhai aapanaa bhaaee gur te bujhai sujaan |
lines.english: Everyone calls God his own, O Siblings of Destiny, but the all-knowing Lord is known only through the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬੀਧੇ ਸੇ ਊਬਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਚਾ ਨੀਸਾਨੁ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jo beedhe se aoobare bhaaee sabad sachaa neesaan |9|
lines.english: Those who are pierced by His Love are saved, O Siblings of Destiny; they bear the Insignia of the True Word of the Shabad. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸੈ ਭਾਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੧੦॥੪॥
lines.translit: khin pal naam ridai vasai bhaaee naanak milan subhaae |10|4|
lines.english: In the same way, if the Naam, the Name of the Lord, dwells in the heart for a moment, even for an instant, O Siblings of Destiny, then one meets the Lord with ease, O Nanak. ||10||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਧਨੁ ਅਧਿਕ ਸਕੇਲੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਪਾਵਕੁ ਰੰਚਕ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eedhan adhik sakeleeai bhaaee paavak ranchak paae |
lines.english: A large pile of firewood, O Siblings of Destiny, will burn if a small fire is applied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਤਿਤੁਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 ghar 1 titukee |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl, First House, Thi-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦ ਜਨ ਤੁਧੁ ਰਾਖਿ ਲਏ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਹਰਣਾਖਸੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: prahilaad jan tudh raakh le har jeeo haranaakhas maar pachaaeaa |
lines.english: You protected Your servant Prahlaad, O Dear Lord, and annihilated Harnaakhash.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਦੀ ਸਦਾ ਤੂ ਰਖਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਤੂ ਰਖਦਾ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa dee sadaa too rakhadaa har jeeo dhur too rakhadaa aaeaa |
lines.english: You always preserve the honor of Your devotees, O Dear Lord; You have protected them from the very beginning of time.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa no parateet hai har jeeo manamukh bharam bhulaaeaa |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs place their faith in the Dear Lord, but the self-willed manmukhs are deluded by doubt. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਏਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: har jee eeh teree vaddiaaee |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, this is Your Glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਨੋ ਜਮੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਨੇੜੈ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa no jam johi na saakai kaal na nerrai jaaee |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death cannot touch Your devotees; death cannot even approach them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖੁ ਤੂ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਭਗਤ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kee paij rakh too suaamee bhagat teree saranaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: You preserve the honor of Your devotees, O Lord Master; Your devotees seek Your Sanctuary. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਸਭ ਭਗਤਾ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ridh sidh sabh bhagataa charanee laagee gur kai sehaj subhaaee |2|
lines.english: Wealth and all the spiritual powers of the Siddhis fall at the feet of the Lord's devotees; they obtain peace and poise from the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਵਲ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: keval raam naam man vasiaa naame hee mukat paaee |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord alone abides in their minds; through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, they find liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਾ ਨੋ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukhaa no parateet na aavee antar lobh suaau |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs have no faith; they are filled with greed and self-interest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਭੇਦਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਾਗਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hiradai sabad na bhedio har naam na laagaa bhaau |
lines.english: They are not Gurmukh - they do not understand the Word of the Shabad in their hearts; they do not love the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜ ਕਪਟ ਪਾਜੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਸੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਫੀਕਾ ਅਲਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: koorr kapatt paaj leh jaasee manamukh feekaa alaau |3|
lines.english: Their masks of falsehood and hypocrisy shall fall off; the self-willed manmukhs speak with insipid words. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਭਗਤੀ ਹੂ ਤੂ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa vich aap varatadaa prabh jee bhagatee hoo too jaataa |
lines.english: You are pervading through Your devotees, O Dear God; through Your devotees, You are known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਸਭ ਲੋਕ ਹੈ ਤੇਰੀ ਤੂ ਏਕੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa moh sabh lok hai teree too eko purakh bidhaataa |
lines.english: All the people are enticed by Maya; they are Yours, Lord - You alone are the Architect of Destiny.
